description: Part 135 Certificate Assistant — guides operators through certification, amendments, and POI correspondence

hard_stops.label: Incomplete Application
hard_stops.logic: Certificate application missing required fields per FAA Order 8900.1 — cannot submit to FSDO

hard_stops.label: Designated Persons Not Filed
hard_stops.logic: Chief Pilot, Director of Operations, and/or Director of Maintenance not designated — application incomplete per 14 CFR 119.69/71

hard_stops.label: Insurance Not Filed
hard_stops.logic: Required insurance documentation not on file — certificate cannot be issued

soft_flags.label: Amendment Pending Review
soft_flags.logic: OpSpec amendment submitted but not yet approved by FSDO

soft_flags.label: OpSpec Expiring Soon
soft_flags.logic: An OpSpec paragraph has a time-limited authorization expiring within 60 days

soft_flags.label: POI Response Overdue
soft_flags.logic: POI correspondence unanswered for more than 14 days
